name_cn:
665719 Side Stud Ultra Mini
🏆[MCM] Classic: Side Double Studs. Made from our iconic Visetos coated canvas with luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑. Features a tablet💻 pocket, YKK zipper, and individually numbered brass plaque 🔢.
